channel.title: GA on Detention Pipeline
channel.description: Recent content in GA on Detention Pipeline

item.title: 875 Douglas Hill Rd — Douglas, GA (300000 SF)
item.description:
Industrial/warehouse property at 875 Douglas Hill Rd, Lithia Springs, Douglas County, GA. 300000 sq ft. Owner: Unknown. Status: available.

Modern racked storage, cross-dock

Source: Easy Logistics Management, 2025

item.title: ALL POINTS LOGISTICS, LLC — ICE HALL, GA $6,455,304
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: ALL POINTS LOGISTICS, LLC Award ID: HSCEMS11J00078 Amount: $6,455,304.07 Description: TACTICAL COMMUNICATIONS EQUIPMENT, PARTS, AND ACCESSORIES (SUBSCRIBER RADIOS AND INFRASTRUCTURE), AMB DB# 4730 AAP# 67675. Period: 2011-09-28 to 2013-03-28 Location: HALL, GA (FIPS: 13139)

item.title: Annex Folkston IPC — Charlton, GA
item.description:
IGSA detention facility: Annex Folkston IPC in Charlton County, GA.

Source: Vera Institute ICE Detention Trends (vera-institute/ice-detention-trends)

item.title: ATLANTIC DIVING SUPPLY, INC. — ICE GA $763,990
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: ATLANTIC DIVING SUPPLY, INC. Award ID: 70CMSW25FC0000134 Amount: $763,990.36 Description: THIS AWARD PROVIDES MISSION CRITICAL LAW ENFORCEMENT EQUIPMENT FOR AGENTS IN THE FIELD TO SUPPORT THE OFFICE OF FIREARM AND TACTICAL PROGRAMS (OFTP). Period: 2025-09-30 to 2026-03-29 Location: , GA (FIPS: )

item.title: AXON ENTERPRISE, INC. — ICE CHATTAHOOCHEE, GA $7,162,929
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: AXON ENTERPRISE, INC. Award ID: 70CMSW24FR0000097 Amount: $7,162,929.07 Description: BODY WORN CAMERAS FOR THE OFFICE OF FIREARMS AND TACTICAL PROGRAMS (OFTP) FIELD USE Period: 2024-09-25 to 2025-09-24 Location: CHATTAHOOCHEE, GA (FIPS: 13053)

item.title: Braselton Logistics Center — Jackson, GA (500000 SF)
item.description:
Industrial/warehouse property at Braselton Logistics Center, Braselton, Jackson County, GA. 500000 sq ft. Owner: Duke Realty/Prologis. Status: available.

I-85 corridor logistics

Source: Public records, 2025

item.title: Bryan County Jail — Bryan, GA
item.description:
IGSA detention facility: Bryan County Jail in Bryan County, GA.

Source: Vera Institute ICE Detention Trends (vera-institute/ice-detention-trends)

item.title: Charlton County, GA — USDA Distress Profile (3 indicators)
item.description:
USDA Economic Research Service county typology flags Charlton County, GA with 3 distress indicators:

low employment ratio; housing stress; low post-secondary education

Full flags: Housing Stress, Low Employment, Low PostSecondary Ed

This county already has an IGSA detention facility. The combination of existing federal detention relationship + economic distress = high vulnerability to expansion pitch.

Nonmetro: nonmetro

Source: USDA ERS County Typology Codes, 2025 edition

item.title: Social Circle GA (Walton County) — NDA Cited to Withhold Detention Info from Public
item.description:
In Social Circle, Georgia (Walton County), officials cited NDAs as grounds for withholding information about a proposed detention facility from the public. This is the ‘Managing the Noise’ pattern from the Sabot playbook.

The NDA tactic shields the negotiation from public scrutiny during the critical period when community opposition could derail the deal. By the time the public knows, architectural plans and financial projections are already complete.

Source: RAMM research

item.title: Stewart County, GA — USDA Distress Profile (4 indicators)
item.description:
USDA Economic Research Service county typology flags Stewart County, GA with 4 distress indicators:

government/corrections-dependent economy; persistent poverty (20%+ poverty rate for 30+ years); low employment ratio; low post-secondary education

Full flags: Government, Low Employment, Low PostSecondary Ed, Persistent Poverty

This county already has an IGSA detention facility. The combination of existing federal detention relationship + economic distress = high vulnerability to expansion pitch.

Nonmetro: metro

Source: USDA ERS County Typology Codes, 2025 edition
